meaning: 斯拉沃尼亚[南斯拉夫北部一地区]
examples: Compared with the gargantuan task of restoring peace in nearby Bosnia, civilising Eastern Slavonia looks simple.
Russia and Belgium each have a battalion in Eastern Slavonia and Moscow has offered more troops.
In some places (eastern Slavonia, northern Iraq), they provide a cooling-off period before reintegration into another country.
